title: Fix client abort runtime overlays in Header and AgentsSidebar
summary: Removed AbortController timeout paths in client polling helpers and replaced with timeout-safe Promise.race behavior.
changes: Replaced abort-based timeout fetch helper with Promise.race null-timeout approach in Header.
Applied same fetch helper hardening in AgentsSidebar.
Kept OpenClaw polling behavior non-blocking and offline-safe.
risks: Fetch requests are no longer explicitly aborted; timed-out calls may complete in background.
rollback: Restore previous AbortController timeout implementation in both components.
